en: Some kind of turf dispute, and apparently we lost.
Everyone quit on us. We have absolutely no distribution.
Is there any way any of this can be traced back to you?
ko: 이 모든 것이 너에게 연결될 가능성이 있을까,

en: Or the police I'm talking about?
Well, there's your silver lining. How about you?
So, how's the health situation? It's, uh...
It's better. Do you mind? Better?
Looking... It's looking a little more positive.
I may have more time than I thought. Outstanding.
Now, as to your dead guy, occupational hazards, drug dealer getting shot, I'm gonna go out
ko: 네가 말한 죽은 사람은 직업적 위험이야.

en: on a limb here and say it's been known to happen.
ko: 흔히 있는 일이라고 말할 수 있어.

en: Now, what about product on hand? How's your inventory?
ko: 자, 현재 보유 중인 제품은 어때?
